title: chore(deps): update dependency algoliasearch to v3.33.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| algoliasearch | devDependencies | minor | [`3.32.1` -> `3.33.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/algoliasearch/3.32.1/3.33.0) | [homepage](https://www.algolia.com/doc/api-client/javascript/), [source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>algolia/algoliasearch-client-js</summary>

### [`v3.33.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​3330)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/compare/3.32.1...3.33.0)

> 2019-05-09

-   FEAT(api-keys): add restore api key method ([#​754](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/issues/754))
    -   `client.restoreApiKey('APIKEY')`: restore a deleted API key
    -   see also <https://www.algolia.com/doc/api-reference/api-methods/restore-api-key>
-   FIX(ua): change the User-Agent to use the new specs lib (version) ([#​747](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/issues/747))

</details>
